---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new endpoint, overlay, visualisation, or operational capability.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What can't MHEAT do today, or what does it do awkwardly? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Shape of the endpoint / control / chart / deployment knob. If it's a
new API, sketch the request and the response. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else could solve the same problem, and why this proposal wins. -->

## Fit within MHEAT

- [ ] Aligns with an EDITO convention (STAC / OGC API / CoverageJSON / …)
- [ ] Requires a new dependency — and `pip-audit` / `npm audit` are clean.
- [ ] Demo-mode reachable (adds to `backend/app/fixtures/` if data is needed).
- [ ] Accessible (a11y suite still green, no keyboard traps).

## Scope / priority

- [ ] Nice-to-have
- [ ] Needed for the EDITO FSTP deliverable (deadline 2026-05-06)
